PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Mila Havlicek (Petitioner in Pro Per). Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Salvador Lopez (Son).

The Court noted that Wells Fargo Bank has received payment in full and that they are no longer has any interest in the estate. Mr. Ferdon reported that Wells Fargo was named as the alternate executor in the Will. The Court advised Ms. Havlicek that there are defects in her petition, that it may helpful to her to get a lawyer. Ms. Havlicek stated that she will get an attorney. Furthermore, she stated that her brother predeceased her mother without issue. Both petitions are continued to February 19, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court will not take Wells Fargo's petition off calendar until it is confirmed. Mr. Ferdon will not need to appear at the next hearing unless he is notified to do so.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator. Matthew Kumar for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner/Creditor) appearing by Court Call. Mila Lopez (Daughter).

Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator does not have enough information to assert the right. Mr. Kumar reported that Wells Fargo has received payment in full and that they no longer have interest in the estate. Ms. Lopez reported that she has filed a petition for probate of will this morning. The Clerk confirmed of such filing and the hearing date is set on October 16, 2013. Wells Fargo Bank's Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Kumar stated when the funds are clear, they will withdraw the petition.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Sep-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
